negative_prompt: full room, full scene, furniture set, background scene, text, watermark, duplicate object, extra object, distorted, low quality
prompt: Repair the target object crop in image 1. The target object is: vase. Image 2, if present, is only reference context for shape, perspective, materials, and occlusion reasoning. Complete missing or cut-out parts of the target object and remove occluders from the target. Preserve the visible target-object pixels as closely as possible, including camera perspective, lighting, material, scale, and edges. Do not copy the reference background, other furniture, or reference layout into the final crop. For a vase or plant, preserve the thin vertical glass/plant structure and complete only the missing continuation of that object. Do not add a room, full scene, extra furniture, text, watermark, or new objects. Use a plain neutral background. Return one clean square product-style image of the single completed target object.
